The '''Mapuzo break-in''' was an event<ref name="AIR" /> that occurred on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] [[Mapuzo/Legends|Mapuzo]]<ref name="Kenobi">{{SW|url=series/obi-wan-kenobi/part-iii-guide|text=Part III Episode Guide | Obi-Wan Kenobi}}</ref> by or in [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]].<ref name="NEC" />

The [[Task Force on Alliance Security]] believed that the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Vadon Lenitor]] had been present during the events that led to the Mapuzo break-in. Thus, they wanted to find Lenitor and interrogate her, although she was not considered as a wanted fugitive.<ref name="AIR" />
